//: DeepSpeed ZeRO Stage 3 config for LLaMA-Factory.
//_when_to_use: Full SFT on very large models (30B+) or any scenario where ZeRO-2 still OOMs. Enables optimizer + gradient + parameter partitioning, plus optional CPU/NVMe offload.

zero_optimization.//_offload_notes: Uncomment the two blocks below to offload optimizer state / params to CPU RAM. Trades GPU memory for ~2-5x slower step time.
